paper_title: Combining the Monthly Drought Code and Paleoecological Data to Assess Holocene Climate Impact on Mediterranean Fire Regime

methods.description: This method involves extracting paleoclimate conditions from HadCM3B-M1 simulations and downscaling these data to reconstruct past climate for each Holocene millennium at the whole island scale of Corsica.

steps.description: Paleoclimate conditions were extracted from HadCM3B-M1 simulations.
steps.searchable_summary: extract paleoclimate conditions from HadCM3B-M1 simulations

steps.description: Compute climate normals (monthly means) for main variables (i.e., air temperature and precipitation) from the simulation data.
steps.searchable_summary: compute climate normals for temperature and precipitation

steps.description: Compute temperature and precipitation anomalies for each millennium using the climate normals.
Downscale these anomalies by applying them to the current period climate normals computed from the ERA-Interim dataset.
